Description: It provides a suite of command-line tools to run BLAST. This allows users to perform BLAST searches on their own server without size, volume and database restrictions.
It is a versatile toolkit designed for assembly and analysis of sequencing data. SPAdes is primarily developed for Illumina sequencing data, but can be used for IonTorrent as well.
It is an ultra-fast and memory-efficient NGS assembler. It is optimized for metagenomes, but also works well on generic single genome assembly and single-cell assembly.

It is an easy-to-use metagenomic wrapper suite that accomplishes the core tasks of metagenomic analysis from start to finish: read quality control, assembly, visualization, taxonomic profiling, extracting draft genomes, and functional annotation.
Effective binning of metagenomic contigs using contrastive multi-view representation learning
It is a command tool for metagenomic binning with deep learning, handles both short and long reads.
It is a robust statistical framework for reconstructing genomes from metagenomic data
It is an automated method that integrates the results of a flexible number of binning algorithms to calculate an optimized, non-redundant set of bins from a single assembly
It compares and "de-replicate" a genome set by identifying groups of highly similar genomes and choosing the best representative genome for each genome set.
It is a program for clustering biological sequences to reduce sequence redundancy and improve the performance of other sequence analyses.
Detect CRISPR-Cas genes and arrays, and predict the subtype based on both Cas genes and CRISPR repeat sequence.
It is a software tool for identifying antiviral defence systems in prokaryotic genomes.
It is a software tool for identifying antiviral defence systems and anti-defence in prokaryotic genomes and viral genomes.
Identify viruses and plasmids in sequencing data (isolates, metagenomes, and metatranscriptomes)
Assigns taxonomy to putative giant virus contigs or metagenome assembled genomes
It is an alignment-based tool for fast and accurate calculation of Average Nucleotide Identity (ANI) between complete or metagenomically-assembled viral genomes
